creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've been in contact with lsof's author (Vic Abell <abe@purdue.edu>), and
received the following response:
---
I don't have a 5.3 test system and the URL doesn't make it too clear what is
going wrong.  It looks a little like some system header file changes need
lsof source compensation.

I'm involved in a big antenna project at the moment, so can't look into the
problem this week.  I should be free next week,

Can you find me a 5.3 test system by then?
---
Can either the Submitter or someone else arrange for Vic to get access to a
5.3 system to fix/investigate this issue?

Thanks!


-- 
Larry Rosenman                     http://www.lerctr.org/~ler
Phone: +1 512-248-2683                E-Mail: ler@lerctr.org
US Mail: 430 Valona Loop, Round Rock, TX 78681-3893
